debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

by

        toNNReal p • dirac True + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False := by
      rw [← map_map_aemeasurable (measurable_pi_apply k) hX.aemeasurable, hX.map_eq,
        bernoulliOn_eq_map, map_map (measurable_pi_apply k) MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable,
        Measure.map_eval_infinitePi]
      · simp [hk]
      · intro; exact ⟨by simp [ENNReal.smul_def, ← ENNReal.coe_add]⟩
    rw [h i hi, h j hj]
